import json
data = json.load\(open\('output/lineage_graph.json'\)\)
print\(f'Nodes: {len\(data[\\"nodes\\"]\)}'\)
print\(f'Edges: {len\(data[\\"links\\"]\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('--- Cross-language edges \(XSLT → Java\) ---'\)
for link in data['links']:
    if 'xslt::' in link['source'] and 'java::' in link['target']:
        print\(f'  {link[\\"source\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'    → {link[\\"target\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'    type: {link[\\"type\\"]}'\)
        print\(\)

Bash(/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.10/bin/python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)
from orchestrator.quick_trace import trace_files, trace_repos

print\('=== 1. trace_files — pass individual files ==='\)
r = trace_files\(
    java_files=['tests/fixtures/mixed-module/src/main/java/TradeTransformService.java'],
    xslt_files=[
        'tests/fixtures/mixed-module/src/main/resources/xslt/trade_output.xsl',
        'tests/fixtures/mixed-module/src/main/resources/xslt/settlement_mapping.xsl',
    ],
    repo_name='mixed',
\)
r.print_summary\(\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 2. trace_repos — multiple repos with explicit dirs ==='\)
r2 = trace_repos\([
    {'name': 'lib', 'path': 'tests/fixtures/multi-repo/lib-common', 'java_dirs': ['tests/fixtures/multi-repo/lib-common/java']},
    {'name': 'app', 'path': 'tests/fixtures/multi-repo/app-trade', 'java_dirs': ['tests/fixtures/multi-repo/app-trade/java'], 'xslt_dirs': ['tests/fixtures/multi-repo/app-trade/xslt']},
]\)
r2.print_summary\(\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 3. trace_repos — auto-scan ==='\)
r3 = trace_repos\([
    {'name': 'mixed', 'path': 'tests/fixtures/mixed-module', 'scan': True},
]\)
r3.print_summary\(\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 4. trace_repos — multi-project multi-module ==='\)
r4 = trace_repos\([
    {'name': 'alpha', 'path': 'tests/fixtures/multi-project/project-alpha', 'project_scan': True},
    {'name': 'beta', 'path': 'tests/fixtures/multi-project/project-beta', 'project_scan': True},
]\)
r4.print_summary\(\)
print\(\)
print\('Cross-repo edges:'\)
for e in r4.edges_by_type\('CROSS_REPO'\):
    print\(f'  {e.source_id} -> {e.target_id}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)
from orchestrator.quick_trace import trace_project

print\('=== trace_project: main app + library dependencies ==='\)
print\(\)
result = trace_project\(
    main='tests/fixtures/app-with-libs/main-app',
    libs=[
        'tests/fixtures/app-with-libs/lib-fields',
        'tests/fixtures/app-with-libs/lib-transform',
    ],
\)
print\(\)
result.print_summary\(\)
print\(\)
print\('--- CROSS_REPO edges \(main -> lib drill-down\) ---'\)
for e in result.edges_by_type\('CROSS_REPO'\):
    print\(f'  {e.source_id}'\)
    print\(f'    ---> {e.target_id}'\)
    print\(f'    props: {e.properties}'\)
" 2>&1)
